overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt exploring a sunlit medieval cemetery with stone tombs and lush greenery. The character attempts to enter a mausoleum, then navigates around to descend into a lower courtyard and explores dimly lit underground crypts with candlelight.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cemetery with stone tombs and monuments

events.description: approaching the large stone mausoleum with ornate green metal door
slows down and stops briefly at the mausoleum entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path through the cemetery, approaching the large stone building

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the tombstones, then walking toward the mausoleum

entered.detail: weathered gray stone grave markers scattered throughout the grassy cemetery
mature trees with dense green canopies providing dappled shade
large historic stone building with tall green patinated metal doors and columns
crumbling stone archway covered in ivy connecting cemetery sections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit medieval cemetery with scattered stone tombstones and lush green grass. The camera follows the character walking along a cobblestone path toward a large stone mausoleum with an ornate green door. A robed NPC appears near the tombstones as the character approaches the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cemetery garden with descending stone stairway to lower courtyard

events.description: turns away from the locked mausoleum door and walks back through the cemetery
begins descending stone staircase leading to lower courtyard level

agents.ego_description: turning back from the inaccessible door and navigating around the cemetery to find an alternate entrance, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in vest looking down at an object in his hands while walking

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading down to a lower level of the cemetery
decorative carved stone railing along the staircase and courtyard edge
medieval stone houses with red tile roofs visible beyond the cemetery walls

segments.scene_description: After finding the mausoleum door inaccessible, the character turns and walks back through the cemetery, passing NPCs walking in the opposite direction. The path leads to a descending stone staircase with ornate balustrades, revealing a lower courtyard area and distant village buildings beyond the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground crypt with candlelit alcoves and stone sarcophagi

events.description: enters covered stone corridor with ivy-draped arches, transitioning from outdoor to indoor
moves from sunlit corridor into dimly lit crypt chamber illuminated by wall candles
discovers blood stains on the floor near the large wooden door at the chamber end

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the dark stone corridors and crypt chambers, examining the candlelit interior and blood-stained floor

entered.detail: narrow walkway with stone walls covered in hanging ivy and vines
large underground room with stone pillars, wall-mounted candles, and stone sarcophagi
ornate stone coffins with carved lids positioned along the walls
heavy dark wooden door with metal studs at the far end of the crypt
dark red stains on the stone floor near the wooden door suggesting recent violence

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stone corridor draped in ivy, transitioning from the bright outdoor cemetery to the dim interior. Moving deeper into the crypt, the lighting shifts to warm candlelight illuminating stone sarcophagi and altars. The segment ends as the character approaches a large wooden door, noticing ominous blood stains on the floor suggesting danger ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval cemetery that gradually descends into the dim, ominous depths of an underground crypt. It begins on a cobblestone path amidst lush green grass and scattered tombstones, following the character toward a large stone mausoleum with an ornate green door. After finding the entrance inaccessible, the camera pivots to follow the character back through the graveyard and down a stone staircase with ornate balustrades, revealing a lower courtyard and distant village buildings. The scene then shifts as the character enters an ivy-draped stone corridor, transitioning from the bright daylight into a dim interior illuminated by warm candlelight reflecting off stone sarcophagi. Finally, the movement leads deeper into the crypt toward a large wooden door, where the lighting grows moodier and blood stains appear on the floor.
